title: Bhavnagar、Gujarat — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Bhavnagar、Gujarat的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Bhavnagar是Gujarat的一個城市，人口約650,000。A coastal city in Gujarat, known for its shipbuilding industry, historic palaces, and proximity to the Gir Forest National Park.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
